prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~1.2 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 72.7 kg; Height 174.4 cm; BMI 23.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/62 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.1%; 9 months ago 7.0%; 6 months ago 7.0%; 3 months ago 6.5%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 157mg/dL; 9 months ago 165mg/dL; 6 months ago 139mg/dL; 3 months ago 126mg/dL; current 121mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 70.9kg; 9 months ago 72.8kg; 6 months ago 72.3kg; 3 months ago 70.9kg; current 72.7kg), Height (12 months ago 174.4cm; 9 months ago 174.4cm; 6 months ago 174.4cm; 3 months ago 174.4cm; current 174.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 23.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 124mmHg; 9 months ago 125mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 60mmHg; 9 months ago 60mmHg; 6 months ago 60mmHg; 3 months ago 63mmHg; current 62mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 27U/L; current 23U/L), AST (12 months ago 10U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 13U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; current 51mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 268mg/g; 9 months ago 361mg/g; 6 months ago 331mg/g; 3 months ago 223mg/g; current 255mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 75mg/dL; 9 months ago 80mg/dL; 6 months ago 75mg/dL; 3 months ago 76mg/dL; current 78mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 59mg/dL; 9 months ago 59mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 56mg/dL; current 57mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 151mg/dL; 9 months ago 148mg/dL; 6 months ago 147mg/dL; 3 months ago 147mg/dL; current 141mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
